mapper.select: SELECT pr_id AS prId, repo_id AS repoId, title AS title, description AS description, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, user_profile AS userProfile, create_at AS createAt, source_branch AS sourceBranch, target_branch AS targetBranch, is_opened AS isOpened, base_sha AS baseSha, head_sha AS headSha, start_sha AS startSha FROM pr WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} ORDER BY pr_id DESC

SELECT pr_id AS prId, repo_id AS repoId, title AS title, description AS description, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, user_profile AS userProfile, create_at AS createAt, source_branch AS sourceBranch, target_branch AS targetBranch, is_opened AS isOpened, base_sha AS baseSha, head_sha AS headSha, start_sha AS startSha FROM pr WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId}
SELECT commit_id AS commitId, repo_id AS repoId, pr_id AS prId, content AS content, commited_at AS commitedAt FROM commit WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId}
SELECT commit_id AS commitId, repo_id AS repoId, pr_id AS prId, content AS content, commited_at AS commitedAt FROM commit WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND commit_id = #{commitId}
SELECT * FROM comment_view WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} ORDER BY comment_create_at ASC
SELECT * FROM comment_view WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (pr_id, content, comment_type, created_at) VALUES (#{prId}, #{content}, #{commentType}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
DELETE FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND re_comment_id = #{reCommentId}
mapper.select: SELECT cf.file_id AS fileId, cf.repo_id AS repoId, cf.pr_id AS prId, cf.file_name AS fileName, cf.old_path AS oldPath, cf.new_path AS newPath, cf.file_status AS fileStatus, p.target_branch AS targetBranch, p.source_branch AS sourceBranch FROM change_file cf JOIN pr p ON cf.pr_id = p.pr_id AND cf.repo_id = p.repo_id WHERE cf.pr_id = #{prId} AND cf.repo_id = #{repoId}

SELECT cf.file_id AS fileId, cf.commit_id AS commitId, cf.repo_id AS repoId, cf.pr_id AS prId, cf.file_name AS fileName, cf.old_path AS oldPath, cf.new_path AS newPath, cf.file_status AS fileStatus, p.target_branch AS targetBranch, p.source_branch AS sourceBranch FROM change_file cf JOIN pr p ON cf.pr_id = p.pr_id AND cf.repo_id = p.repo_id WHERE cf.commit_id = #{commitId} AND cf.pr_id = #{prId} AND cf.repo_id = #{repoId}

SELECT cf.file_id AS fileId, cf.commit_id AS commitId, cf.repo_id AS repoId, cf.pr_id AS prId, cf.file_name AS fileName, cf.old_path AS oldPath, cf.new_path AS newPath, cf.file_status AS fileStatus, p.target_branch AS targetBranch, p.source_branch AS sourceBranch FROM change_file cf WHERE cf.file_id = #{fileId}
